description: This strappy number will raise your glam quotient when you pair it with skinny jeans or a little black dress for nights out with the girls. Its sturdy soles and vibrant interlaced straps are made for strutting around. Giving your feet that delicate, yet comfortable feel.heels: 3"UpperSingle synthetic leather strap across the forefootCriss cross straps across the midfoot joining at the heel collarZippered heel collarSoft footbed for instep comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heels for enhanced grip and tractionPicture patterned groovesSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
